channel.title: Becoming The Unbeatable
channel.description: Recent content on Becoming The Unbeatable

item.description: Plans Todo List Read 6 Technical Books Database Internals Designing Machine Learning Systems The Pragmatic Programmer Complete 6 Technical Courses TinyML and Efficient Deep Learning Computing MIT 18.065 Matrix Methods In Data Analysis, Signal Processing, And Machine Learning Read at-least 2 papers in a week Update Monthly Log book every friday Complete 500 more problem in LeetCode Focus on hard and mid problems (ideally 70-30 split, hard being 70%) Solve 100 problems in AtCoder + CF PkaU8iN88lAWtu4z7K1kibLZjQaVZfGnAP8GCH3/zlFFIL6D26LcqwNqi8X7SXdGCCTNN/eoC+OLiepwW18ecQ== Write 18 blogs/posts on Personal Site Goal List Reach Guardian in LeetCode Possible but slightly difficult, probably start participating in contest post March.

item.title: LC contest problems summary
item.description: Biweekly-66 (27th Nov, 2021) 2085. Count Common Words With One Occurrence Hint 1 Use hashmap (Counter) 2086. Minimum Number of Buckets Required to Collect Rainwater from Houses" Hint 1 First put the bucket at best place and the remove those covering home. Hint 2 Answer is (best bucket cnt + remaining house). Hint 3 Corner case: check for each house is coverable 2087. Minimum Cost Homecoming of a Robot in a Grid Hint djikstra will fail.

item.title: Hugo commands
item.description: run local server hugo server -D Create New Post hugo new content/posts/{post-name}.md Hugo build/export the site hugo -d ../becoming-the-unbeatable relative imports example: static\icons\favicon.png relative imports: icons\favicon.png fix for label image icon: /becoming-the-unbeatable/small_icon.jpg instead of icon: small_icon.png github issue: https://github.com/adityatelange/hugo-PaperMod/issues/622
